_comment: CMIP6 third-pass PDF extraction. 24 new PDFs added 2026-06-27. Targets residual unknowns from second pass. Run with args: {batch_id: N, state_path: '<this file>'}.
_unresolvable: BCC-CSM2-MR N-dep; MRI-ESM2-0 N-dep/Fe-dep/CO2-mode; MIROC-ES2H (Watanabe2021 not available) — no new PDFs for these

batches.label: MPI-ESM family (G/SO/VL + HAM aerosols)
batches.note: Mauritsen 2019 JAMES (doi:10.1029/2018MS001400) is the primary CMIP6 MPI-ESM1-2 paper. Tegen 2019 GMD (doi:10.5194/gmd-12-1643-2019) = HAM Part 1 aerosol evaluation. Neubauer 2019 GMD (doi:10.5194/gmd-12-3609-2019) = HAM Part 2. Already confirmed for LR/HR: O/SD/SI/BC/OC=✓std(CEDS); MD/SS=FXc. Do not change these.
batches.results_summary: G/SO/VL unresolvable — Mauritsen 2019 never names Meinshausen2017, Matthes2017, or IACETH SAGE3λ by name. HAM: LU=✓std confirmed (shared JSBACH3.2); N-dep=✓std confirmed (Mauritsen2019 s5.2 shared HAMOCC6). SD/BC/OC for HAM remain ~ (ACCMIP used in evaluation runs; CEDS+BB4CMIP6 for CMIP6 historical not confirmed in any paper).

batches.label: CNRM family (G/MD/SS/LU/SO/VL + ESM2-1 BGC)
batches.note: Voldoire 2019 JAMES (doi:10.1029/2019MS001683) = primary CNRM-CM6-1 paper. Michou 2019 JAMES (doi:10.1029/2019MS001816) = aerosols + ozone for CM6-1 and ESM2-1. Seferian 2019 JAMES (doi:10.1029/2019MS001791) = CNRM-ESM2-1 primary paper. Already confirmed for all: O=~(semi-interactive); SD/SI/BC/OC=✗dev(TACTIC_v2). Do not change these.
batches.results_summary: FULLY RESOLVED for CM6-1 and CM6-1-HR (G/SO/VL=✓std, MD/SS/LU=✗dev). ESM2-1 fully resolved except N-dep=? (not mentioned in any paper).

batches.label: IPSL-CM6A-LR (G/LU/SO) + TaiESM1 (G/O/LU/SO/VL)
batches.note: IPSL: Boucher 2020 JAMES (doi:10.1029/2019MS002010) = primary IPSL-CM6A-LR system description. Already confirmed: O=✓std; aerosols all ~. CRITICAL for TaiESM1: Lee 2020 GMD IS the CMIP6 TaiESM1 paper — TaiESM1 was NOT a contributor to CMIP5. Previous batch agent misidentified it as CMIP5-era. Re-read carefully for CMIP6 historical forcing datasets. Aerosols=~(SNAP) already confirmed — do not change. Wang 2021 JAMES (doi:10.1029/2020MS002353) is a companion evaluation paper.
batches.results_summary: IPSL: G=✓std, LU=✓std confirmed; SO=? still (not named in Boucher 2020). TaiESM1: G/O/LU/SO/VL all still ? — neither Lee 2020 nor Wang 2021 names specific CMIP6 forcing datasets.

batches.label: GISS family (E2-1-G / E2-2-G / E3-G)
batches.note: Kelley 2020 JAMES (doi:10.1029/2019MS002025) = ModelE2.1 = GISS-E2-1-G CMIP6 configurations. Rind 2020 JGR (doi:10.1029/2019JD032204) + Orbe 2020 JGR (doi:10.1029/2020JD033151) = ModelE2.2 = GISS-E2-2-G. Russotto 2021 JAMES (doi:10.1029/2021MS002601) = GISS-E3 tropical cyclones — extract all forcing info available even if incomplete. E2-1-G O=✗dev already confirmed; do not change.
batches.results_summary: E2-1-G: VL=✓std confirmed (Thomason2018 via Kelley2020 §3.2); G/LU/SO=? need Miller 2020 JAMES doi:10.1029/2019MS002034. E2-2-G: aerosols all ~ confirmed; G/LU/SO/VL=?. E3-G: all ? — Russotto 2021 is development runs paper with no CMIP6 historical forcing info; primary ModelE3 paper not found.

batches.label: GFDL-ESM4 (LU/VL/N-dep) + GFDL-CM4 (LU/VL) + CAMS-CSM1-0 (aerosols/LU)
batches.note: GFDL-CM4: Held 2019 was read in second pass without resolving LU/VL; re-read alongside Dunne 2020 for any cross-model forcing table. GFDL-ESM4: Dunne 2020 JAMES (doi:10.1029/2019MS002015) is the primary CMIP6 ESM4 paper — check appendices and supplementary material carefully. CAMS-CSM1-0: Rong 2021 AdvAtmosSc (doi:10.1007/s00376-020-0171-y) is the CMIP6 historical paper — the previously available Rong 2018 was a precursor paper. Already confirmed: G/O/SO=✓std; VL=✗dev(zeroed).
batches.results_summary: GFDL-CM4: LU/VL still ? — neither Held 2019 nor Dunne 2020 names these explicitly; missing Winton 2020 JAMES doi:10.1029/2019MS001819. GFDL-ESM4: LU=✓std, VL=✓std (both medium confidence via CMIP6 compliance statement). CAMS-CSM1-0: SD/SI/BC/OC=✓std (MACv2-SP Rong2021), VL=✓std CORRECTED from ✗dev (Rong2021 formal runs use IACETH), LU=✗dev (fixed land use Table1). MD/SS=? still.

batches.label: FGOALS-g3 + FGOALS-f3-L (all remaining)
batches.note: FGOALS-g3: Li 2020 JAMES (doi:10.1029/2019MS002012) = primary CMIP6 g3 paper; Li 2020 JGR (doi:10.1029/2020JD032574) = GAMIL3 atmospheric component (shared with g3). O=✓std already confirmed for FGOALS-g3. FGOALS-f3-L: He 2019 AdvAtmosSc (doi:10.1007/s00376-019-9027-8) = historical AMIP; He 2020 AtmosOceScLett (doi:10.1080/16742834.2020.1778419) = CMIP6 DECK; Guo 2020 AdvAtmosSc (doi:10.1007/s00376-020-2004-4) = CMIP6 historical overview. G/O/SD/SI/BC/OC/SO already confirmed for f3-L.
batches.results_summary: FGOALS-g3: FULLY RESOLVED — MD=✗dev(constant AOD=0.14), SS=✗dev(same constant), LU=✓std(Hurtt2017-LUH2), SO=✓std(Matthes2017), VL=✓std, G=✓std, SD/SI/BC/OC=✓std(MACv2-SP). FGOALS-f3-L: MD=~(CAM-Chem offline), SS=~(same), LU=✗dev(Hurtt2011-CMIP5), VL=? still.

batches.label: FIO-ESM-2-0 + EC-Earth3-ESM-1 + INM-CM5-0 (LU)
batches.note: FIO-ESM-2-0: Bao 2020 JGR (doi:10.1029/2019JC016036) = primary CMIP6 paper; uses CAM5.3+CLM4.5 — expect similar forcing to CMCC/FIO-ESM lineage. EC-Earth3-ESM-1: van Noije 2021 GMD (doi:10.5194/gmd-14-5637-2021) covers EC-Earth3-AerChem (IFS+TM5), not ESM-1 directly; extract all forcing info for the shared EC-Earth3 IFS atmospheric core; note if ESM-1-specific info is absent and what was inferred. INM-CM5-0: Volodin 2017 ClimDyn (doi:10.1007/s00382-017-3539-7) = primary CMIP6 paper; G/O/SO/VL/aerosols confirmed — only LU remains ?.
batches.results_summary: FIO-ESM-2-0: G/O/SD/SI/BC/OC=✓std, MD/SS=✗dev(CMIP5 bg), SO/VL=✓std, CO2-mode=＋exc(emissions-driven); LU=? still. EC-Earth3-ESM-1: ALL ? — van Noije 2021 covers AerChem not ESM-1; no primary ESM-1 paper found. INM-CM5-0: LU=? still — Volodin 2017 doesn't mention land-use forcing.
